title: coreopsis bacana
intro: Coreopsis bacana, a flowering plant species within the daisy family, is known for its vibrant yellow and pink flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Coreopsis bacana include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis bacana can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for use as a dietary supplement or natural remedy.
